input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.7.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.7.2
            TITLE: the only work permitted during driver change is:

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.7.2: The only work permitted during Driver Change is:
D.12.7.2 The only work permitted during Driver Change is: 
a. Operation of Master Switches IC.9.3, EV.7.9, Main Switch IC.9.4, or Shutdown Buttons

final_answer: D.12.7.2 The only work permitted during Driver Change is: a. Operation of Master Switches IC.9.3, EV.7.9, Main Switch IC.9.4, or Shutdown Buttons
